title: hieracium psammogenes
intro: Hieracium psammogenes, also known as sand hawk's beard, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Hieracium psammogenes include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve overall gut health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations often involve infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
